operations.description: The citation graph for a Rechtspraak decision. Choose one direction via `type`: `citedLaws` (BWB laws this decision cites, grouped with article pinpoints), `citedDecisions` (decisions this one cites — includes foreign ECLIs such as CJEU/ECHR with no cdx-nl link), or `citingDecisions` (decisions that cite this one). Use /meta `relationCounts` first to learn which directions are non-empty and how many results exist.

RechtspraakRelatedResponse.description: Paginated related-documents page for one relation direction.

totalResults.description: Total before paging; matches the matching /meta relationCounts value.

RechtspraakRelatedItem.description: A related item. Decision fields (ecli/types/court/decisionDate) for citedDecisions & citingDecisions; law fields (bwbId/articles) for citedLaws. `url` is a cdx-nl:// link when resolvable, omitted otherwise (the ecli/bwbId remains as an external or cross-plugin handle).

types.description: LiDO linktype slugs (roles) for this citation edge (decision items), e.g. ["lx-referentie", "rvr-cassatie-eerdereaanleg"]. Usually one; LiDO can relate the same target ECLI under several roles.

court.description: Court label (decision items). Best-effort for foreign/unresolved ECLIs.

articles.description: Article-level pinpoints under this law (law items).

url.description: cdx-nl:// link to the referenced document; omitted when not resolvable. Use verbatim, never construct.
